name: unify-ascend-task-hub
description: Unify Ascend Command Center — internal project intake, task tracking, time logging, and PM automation for the Ascend team

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix server && npm run build --prefix client
scripts.setup: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
